title: hoarea carinata
intro: Hoarea carinata, also known as African chamomile or yellow chamomile, is a flowering plant species native to East Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Hoarea carinata include reducing anxiety and insomnia, promoting relaxation and calming effects, and easing menstrual cramps and digestive issues. Hoarea carinata is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be consumed to reap its benefits.
